name: @gana-v8/hermes-control-plane
description: Coordinates workflows, tasks, policies, and approvals for gana-v8.

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @gana-v8/ingestion-worker build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/public-api build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/queue-adapters build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/research-worker build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/scoring-worker build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/publisher-worker build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/validation-worker build && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @gana-v8/ingestion-worker build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/public-api build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/queue-adapters build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/research-worker build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/scoring-worker build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/publisher-worker build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/validation-worker build && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node --test --test-concurrency=1 dist/tests/**/*.test.js
scripts.test:automation-smoke: pnpm --filter @gana-v8/ingestion-worker build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/public-api build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/queue-adapters build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/research-worker build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/scoring-worker build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/publisher-worker build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/validation-worker build && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node --test --test-concurrency=1 --test-name-pattern=runAutomationCycle dist/tests/**/*.test.js
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @gana-v8/ingestion-worker build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/public-api build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/queue-adapters build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/research-worker build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/scoring-worker build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/publisher-worker build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/validation-worker build && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.clean: node --eval "import('node:fs/promises').then(fs => fs.rm('dist', { recursive: true, force: true }))"
